rooms.name: Shashemene Shared Bed
rooms.description: A clean, budget-friendly shared dormitory bed for the traveler who wants comfort without the frills. Shared bath and communal lounge included.

rooms.name: The Inter Standard
rooms.description: Warm, well-appointed and quiet — our Standard Room pairs five-star bedding with a private bath and city views.

rooms.name: Entoto Deluxe Room
rooms.description: Spacious and light-filled, the Deluxe Room adds a lounge nook, a rain shower, and views over Entoto's hills.

rooms.name: Sheba Luxury Suite
rooms.description: A gold-lit two-room suite with a private balcony, soaking tub, and in-room dining bar. Named for the Queen of Sheba.

rooms.name: VIP Royal Room
rooms.description: Our signature suite: a private butler, panoramic Addis skyline views, a dedicated valet, and hand-finished gold interiors.

menu.name: Ful Medames & Injera
menu.description: Slow-cooked fava beans, spiced butter, soft-boiled egg and warm injera.

menu.name: Gold Standard Doro Wat
menu.description: Our master chefs' take on the classic — berbere-braised chicken, boiled egg, served with injera.

menu.name: Tibs Flambé
menu.description: Pan-seared beef tenderloin, rosemary, tableside flame finish, roasted vegetables.

menu.name: Ethiopian Coffee Ceremony
menu.description: Hand-roasted beans, three rounds, served with popcorn and frankincense — tableside.

menu.name: Honey Tej Reduction Cake
menu.description: Dark honey-wine cake, spiced crumb, whipped mascarpone.

menu.name: Kitfo Royale
menu.description: Minced beef, mitmita and niter kibbeh, served warmed or leb leb, with fresh ayib.
